accessToken.description: Your TikTok Access Token. Please see TikTok’s [Events API documentation](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1701890979375106) for information on how to generate an access token via the TikTok Ads Manager or API.
accessToken.label: Access Token

appID.description: Your TikTok App ID. Please see TikTok’s [Events API documentation](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1701890979375106) for information on how to find this value.
appID.label: TikTok App ID

actions.name: Report App Event
actions.description: Report App events directly to TikTok. Data shared can power TikTok solutions like dynamic product ads, custom targeting, campaign optimization and attribution.

fields.label: Event Source
fields.description: The type of events you are uploading through TikTok Events API. For non mobile related events use one of the following Integrations: [TikTok Conversions](https://segment.com/docs/connections/destinations/catalog/tiktok-conversions/), [TikTok Offline Conversions](https://segment.com/docs/connections/destinations/catalog/actions-tiktok-offline-conversions) or [TikTok Pixel](https://segment.com/docs/connections/destinations/catalog/actions-tiktok-pixel).

choices.label: The events took place on a Mobile App.

event_source.title: Event Source
event_source.description: The type of events you are uploading through TikTok Events API. For non mobile related events use one of the following Integrations: [TikTok Conversions](https://segment.com/docs/connections/destinations/catalog/tiktok-conversions/), [TikTok Offline Conversions](https://segment.com/docs/connections/destinations/catalog/actions-tiktok-offline-conversions) or [TikTok Pixel](https://segment.com/docs/connections/destinations/catalog/actions-tiktok-pixel).

fields.label: Event Name
fields.description: Conversion event name. Please refer to the "App Standard Events" section on in TikTok’s [Supported events documentation](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1771101186666498) for accepted event names.

event.title: Event Name
event.description: Conversion event name. Please refer to the "App Standard Events" section on in TikTok’s [Supported events documentation](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1771101186666498) for accepted event names.

fields.label: Event ID
fields.description: Any hashed ID that can identify a unique user/session.

event_id.title: Event ID
event_id.description: Any hashed ID that can identify a unique user/session.

fields.label: Event Timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp that the event took place, in ISO 8601 format.

timestamp.title: Event Timestamp
timestamp.description: Timestamp that the event took place, in ISO 8601 format.

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.description: A single phone number or array of phone numbers in E.164 standard format. Segment will hash this value before sending to TikTok. e.g. +14150000000. Segment will hash this value before sending to TikTok.

phone_number.title: Phone Number
phone_number.description: A single phone number or array of phone numbers in E.164 standard format. Segment will hash this value before sending to TikTok. e.g. +14150000000. Segment will hash this value before sending to TikTok.

fields.label: Email
fields.description: A single email address or an array of email addresses. Segment will hash this value before sending to TikTok.

email.title: Email
email.description: A single email address or an array of email addresses. Segment will hash this value before sending to TikTok.

fields.label: Mobile Advertising ID
fields.description: Identifier for Advertisers (IDFA for iOS devices and AAID for Android devices). Used for mobile app events tracking.

advertising_id.title: Mobile Advertising ID
advertising_id.description: Identifier for Advertisers (IDFA for iOS devices and AAID for Android devices). Used for mobile app events tracking.

fields.label: App Information
fields.description: Information about the mobile app where the event took place. This field is an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative.

app.title: App Information
app.description: Information about the mobile app where the event took place. This field is an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative.

app_id.title: Mobile App ID
app_id.description: For iOS Apps use the app ID found in the App Store URL. For Android Apps in the Google Play store, use the app ID found in the Google Play store URL. For Android Apps not in the Google Play store, use the package name.

app_name.title: App Name
app_name.description: The name of the mobile app.

app_version.title: App Version
app_version.description: The version of the mobile app.

fields.label: Ad Information
fields.description: Information about the ad that led to the app event. This field is an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative.

ad.title: Ad Information
ad.description: Information about the ad that led to the app event. This field is an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative.

callback.title: Callback
callback.description: Callback information to help attribute events.

is_retargeting.title: Is Retargeting
is_retargeting.description: Whether the user is a retargeting user.

fields.label: Device Details
fields.description: Mobile device details.

device_type.title: Device Type
device_type.description: Used to help determine which device the Mobile Advertising ID is and Mobile Device ID is for.

device_id.title: Device ID
device_id.description: The iOS IDFV. Android Device ID is not supported at this time.

device_version.title: Device Version
device_version.description: The operating system version of the device.

ad_tracking_enabled.title: Ad Tracking Enabled
ad_tracking_enabled.description: Indicates whether the user has limited ad tracking on their device.

fields.label: External ID
fields.description: Uniquely identifies the user who triggered the conversion event. Segment will hash this value before sending to TikTok. TikTok Conversions Destination supports both string and string[] types for sending external ID(s).

external_id.title: External ID
external_id.description: Uniquely identifies the user who triggered the conversion event. Segment will hash this value before sending to TikTok. TikTok Conversions Destination supports both string and string[] types for sending external ID(s).

fields.label: Locale
fields.description: The BCP 47 language identifier. For reference, refer to the [IETF BCP 47 standardized code](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/bcp/bcp47.txt).

locale.title: Locale
locale.description: The BCP 47 language identifier. For reference, refer to the [IETF BCP 47 standardized code](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/bcp/bcp47.txt).

fields.label: App Tracking Transparency Status
fields.description: The App Tracking Transparency (ATT) status of the user on iOS devices. This field is required when sending events from iOS 14.5+ devices but should be set to 'Not Applicable' if the iOS version is below 14 or the device is running Android. Selecting AUTO will allow Segment to determine the value to send based on Mobile platform, version, and ad tracking settings.

att_status.title: App Tracking Transparency Status
att_status.description: The App Tracking Transparency (ATT) status of the user on iOS devices. This field is required when sending events from iOS 14.5+ devices but should be set to 'Not Applicable' if the iOS version is below 14 or the device is running Android. Selecting AUTO will allow Segment to determine the value to send based on Mobile platform, version, and ad tracking settings.

fields.label: IP Address
fields.description: IP address of the device.

fields.label: User Agent
fields.description: User agent from the user’s device.

user_agent.title: User Agent
user_agent.description: User agent from the user’s device.

fields.label: Contents
fields.description: Related item details for the event.

contents.title: Contents
contents.description: Related item details for the event.

brand.title: Brand
brand.description: Brand name of the product item.

fields.label: Content IDs
fields.description: Product IDs associated with the event, such as SKUs. Do not populate this field if the 'Contents' field is populated. This field accepts a single string value or an array of string values.

content_ids.title: Content IDs
content_ids.description: Product IDs associated with the event, such as SKUs. Do not populate this field if the 'Contents' field is populated. This field accepts a single string value or an array of string values.

fields.label: Number of Items
fields.description: Number of items when checkout was initiated. Used with the InitiateCheckout event.

num_items.title: Number of Items
num_items.description: Number of items when checkout was initiated. Used with the InitiateCheckout event.

fields.label: Content Type
fields.description: Type of the product item. When the `content_id` in the `Contents` field is specified as a `sku_id`, set this field to `product`. When the `content_id` in the `Contents` field is specified as an `item_group_id`, set this field to `product_group`.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: Type of the product item. When the `content_id` in the `Contents` field is specified as a `sku_id`, set this field to `product`. When the `content_id` in the `Contents` field is specified as an `item_group_id`, set this field to `product_group`.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Currency for the value specified as ISO 4217 code.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Currency for the value specified as ISO 4217 code.

fields.label: Value
fields.description: Value of the order or items sold.

value.title: Value
value.description: Value of the order or items sold.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: A string description of the item or page.

description.title: Description
description.description: A string description of the item or page.

fields.label: Limited Data Use
fields.description: Use this field to flag an event for limited data processing. TikTok will recognize this parameter as a request for limited data processing, and will limit its processing activities accordingly if the event shared occurred in an eligible location. To learn more about the Limited Data Use feature, refer to [Events API 2.0 - Limited Data Use](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1771101204435970).

limited_data_use.title: Limited Data Use
limited_data_use.description: Use this field to flag an event for limited data processing. TikTok will recognize this parameter as a request for limited data processing, and will limit its processing activities accordingly if the event shared occurred in an eligible location. To learn more about the Limited Data Use feature, refer to [Events API 2.0 - Limited Data Use](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1771101204435970).

fields.label: Test Event Code
fields.description: Use this field to specify that events should be test events rather than actual traffic. You can find your Test Event Code in your TikTok Events Manager under the "Test Event" tab. You'll want to remove your Test Event Code when sending real traffic through this integration.

test_event_code.title: Test Event Code
test_event_code.description: Use this field to specify that events should be test events rather than actual traffic. You can find your Test Event Code in your TikTok Events Manager under the "Test Event" tab. You'll want to remove your Test Event Code when sending real traffic through this integration.

fields.label: Search String
fields.description: The text string entered by the user for the search. Optionally used with the Search event.

search_string.title: Search String
search_string.description: The text string entered by the user for the search. Optionally used with the Search event.
